author: Matboi
description: Automatically adds existing vault tags to notes with your configured LLM API. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Automatically adds existing vault tags to notes with your configured LLM API.

name: LLM Auto Tagger

releases.author: matbo1
releases.description:
Maintenance release for Obsidian community plugin submission review.
这是根据 Obsidian 社区插件提交审核反馈发布的维护版本。
releases.name: LLM Auto Tagger 1.0.1

releases.author: matbo1
releases.description:
Auto Tagger for Obsidian 首个正式版本。
Auto Tagger 可以通过你配置的 LLM 服务，从当前 vault 已有标签中为笔记选择合适的标签，并写入笔记 frontmatter。

Initial release of Auto Tagger for Obsidian.
Auto Tagger uses a configured LLM provider to suggest tags from existing vault tags and writes matching tags to note frontmatter.
releases.name: Auto Tagger for Obsidian v1.0.0
